channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New Medicare anti-fraud strategy achieves historic $42 billion in savings
New Trump UFO file release includes military footage of mysterious star-shaped object
item.description: Declassified infrared videos from military sensors show unidentified objects over the Yellow Sea and near the Pantex nuclear facility.

item.title: Trump says Iran would be obliterated if he is killed
item.description: Downplaying reports of a new Iranian assassination plot, President Trump told an interviewer he has left instructions...

item.title: Another autopsy Democrats do not want to read: The Maine debacle was entirely their own creation
